creator: naddy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm okay with the patch itself, obviously.

However, I don't understand the upgrade path. At the moment, most users of openntpd will have libretls installed, which conflicts with libressl@libtls. Do you intend to do a second pass where you remove security/libretls, with an UPDATING entry to replace libretls with libressl@libtls, and PORTREVISION bumps of the dependent ports?
